svg.style: background: #FFFFFF; background-color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #82EB9A); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="PBM Multi-Agent Workflow" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="973" dy="537" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1100" background="light-dark(#FFFFFF,#82EB9A)" math="0" shadow="1"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="doctor" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Doctor prescribes medication" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pharmacist" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Pharmacist submits claim" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="40" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pbm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="PBM Claim Intake" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="40" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="orchestrator" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1" value="AI Orchestrator" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="40" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="clinical" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Clinical Agent
- Alternatives
- Justification
- Confidence Score" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="220" x="340" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="policy" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Policy Agent
- Formulary check
- Coverage rules
- Confidence Score" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="220" x="340" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="financial" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Financial Agent
- Cost savings
- Copay impact
- Confidence Score" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="220" x="340" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="historical" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Historical Decision Agent
- Similar cases
- Success rate
- Confidence Score" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="220" x="340" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aggregation" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1" value="Confidence Aggregation
Final Score = Σ(Confidence × Weight)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="660" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="decision" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Final Confidence
>= Threshold?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="980" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="approve" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Auto-Approved
Sent to PBM Processing" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="1220" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="escalate" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Escalated to Prescribing Doctor" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="1220" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="doctoraction" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Doctor Action:
Accept / Reject / Modify" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="1220" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="feedback" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;dashed=1;" value="Feeds into Historical Decision Agent" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="660" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="doctor" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="pharmacist"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="pharmacist" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="pbm"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="pbm" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="orchestrator"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="orchestrator" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="clinical"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="orchestrator" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="policy"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="orchestrator" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="financial"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="orchestrator" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="historical"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="clinical" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="aggregation"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="policy" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="aggregation"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="financial" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="aggregation"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="historical" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="aggregation"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="aggregation" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="decision"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e13" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="approve" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e14" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="escalate" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e15" edge="1" parent="1" source="escalate" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;" target="doctoraction"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e16" edge="1" parent="1" source="doctoraction" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;dashed=1;" target="feedback"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e17" edge="1" parent="1" source="feedback" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;dashed=1;" target="historical"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
